title: IEM MOS Forecast (Discrete Model Runs)
description: STORAGE SCHEMA for discrete NWP model run forecasts from IEM MOS bulk API. One row per (station, model, issued_at, valid_at). These are real model runs with provenance — you know exactly which forecast cycle produced each value. Primary forecast source for ML training.

station_code.description: Canonical 3-letter NWS station code. IEM API uses ICAO (KORD), normalised to MostlyRight code (ORD) at parse time.

model.description: IEM MOS model. NBS = NBM Short (3-hourly to 72h). NBE = NBM Extended (12-hourly to 192h). GFS = GFS MOS (3/6-hourly). NAM deferred.

issued_at.description: Model run initialization time (UTC, Z-suffix). Maps from IEM 'runtime' field.

valid_at.description: When the forecast is valid for (UTC, Z-suffix). Maps from IEM 'ftime' field.

forecast_hour.description: Hours ahead: (valid_at - issued_at) in whole hours. Hour 0 = analysis/nowcast.

ingested_at.description: When we fetched this record (UTC, Z-suffix). Null for historical backfill, populated for live polling.

temperature_f.description: Air temperature in Fahrenheit. IEM 'tmp'. Integer precision (MOS text product). Store as-is.

dewpoint_f.description: Dewpoint in Fahrenheit. IEM 'dpt'. Integer precision.

temperature_c.description: Temperature in Celsius. Converted from temperature_f at ingest. No rounding.

dewpoint_c.description: Dewpoint in Celsius. Converted from dewpoint_f at ingest. No rounding.

cloud_cover_code.description: Cloud cover category. IEM 'cld'. CL=clear, SC=scattered, BK=broken, OV=overcast.

ceiling_cat.description: Ceiling height category. IEM 'cig'. Sentinel -88 mapped to null at ingest.

qpf_6hr_in.description: Quantitative precipitation forecast, 6-hour (inches). IEM 'q06'. Stored in native IEM units.

qpf_12hr_in.description: Quantitative precipitation forecast, 12-hour (inches). IEM 'q12'. Stored in native IEM units.

precip_type.description: Precipitation type. IEM 'typ'. R=rain, S=snow, Z=freezing rain, IP=ice pellets.

thunder_prob_6hr.description: Thunderstorm probability, 6-hour. IEM 't06'. String format, e.g. '0/5'.

$comment: ARCHITECTURE DECISIONS: (1) DISCRETE MODEL RUNS with provenance. Each row has issued_at (model run time) and valid_at (forecast target time). This is what ML needs: 'what did NBS predict at 12Z on March 15 for March 16 at 18Z?' (2) IEM-native units preserved: °F for temperature (integer MOS precision), knots for wind, inches for QPF. Celsius added via conversion at ingest, no rounding. (3) Sentinel handling: IEM cig=-88 mapped to null at parse time, never stored. (4) forecast_hour = int((valid_at - issued_at).total_seconds() / 3600). issued_at <= valid_at (hour-0 = analysis). (5) All timestamps UTC with Z suffix (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ). IEM runtime/ftime normalized at ingest. (6) ICAO mapping: IEM API uses 4-char ICAO (KORD), stored as 3-char station_code (ORD). NYC/KNYC is a special case. (7) Dedup: exact-duplicate on (station_code, model, issued_at, valid_at), first-seen wins. No cross-source priority. (8) NBS is 3-hourly, NBE is 12-hourly, GFS varies — store as-is, never interpolate. (9) NAM deferred for this sprint.
